title: Bare Bones x Trailier Tales
description: Retextures the Trailier Tales mod to work with the Bare Bones resource pack.
body:
# Bare Bones x Trailier Tales
This pack changes the textures of the [Trailier Tales](https://modrinth.com/mod/trailier-tales) mod to fit with the [Bare Bones](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/bare-bones) resource pack. 
## Resource Pack order
Be sure to have this pack placed above the 'Fabric Mods' one.![Order in which the resource packs must be placed. 'Bare Bones x Trailier Tales' must go above 'Fabric Mods'.](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/65e85df4c74ef0431e3a998be71d66b1484310d3_0.webp)
